reference: Hi, I am concerned about some twitching or pulsating occurring in the lower right corner of my mouth and also in the left eyelid, which is the usual twitch in the eye. I am not sure what could be causing it, but it has been happening on and off for about four to five days. What could it be?
text: Hi, I am concerned about some twitching or pulsating occurring in the lower right corner of my mouth and also in the leg, which is the usual twitch in the eye. I am not sure what could be causing it, but it has been happening on and off for about four to five days. What could it be?
